props.variant: Visual style — elevated, flat, tonal, outlined, text, plain, gradient, relief, or line.
props.color: A theme color name (primary, success…) or any CSS color.
props.size: x-small, small, default, large, x-large, or a custom value.
props.icon: Renders a round, icon-only button when set to an icon value.
props.loading: Shows a spinner and blocks interaction.
props.block: Stretches the button to the full container width.
props.href: Renders the button as an <a> link.

events.click: Emitted on click when the button is not disabled or loading.
